publishedAbstract: * Using Fibre Channel PersistentVolumes in OpenShift Container Platform. * Manifests define PersistentVolumes and PersistentVolumeClaims for Fibre Channel storage. * Desired metrics for monitoring disk usage: kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes and kubelet_volume_stats_available_bytes. * Metrics not available for Fibre Channel PersistentVolumes. * Metrics work correctly for NFS PersistentVolumes. * Unable to see the used PVC section on the terminal CLI.
publishedTitle: Unable to Monitor Storage Usage Metrics for Fibre Channel PersistentVolumes
